abilities.effect:
You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
* **Cantrip** *chill touch*
* **1st** *animate dead*, *fear*
abilities.name: Activate

stat_block.text:
This macabre staff is crafted from gleaming white bone, a spinal column spiraling out of its base with a skull swinging from the spine's tip. It was handcraft for Nyctessa by her father, a powerful Blood Lord, from her mortal mother's bones.  
When you damage a creature with *Nyctessa’s staff*, that creature gains weakens 2 to negative damage until the end of your next turn.

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Necromancy
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the necromancy school of magic, typically involving forces of life and death.

traits.name: Staff
traits.text: This magic item holds spells of a particular theme and allows a spellcaster to cast additional spells by preparing the staff.
